name: codex-must-work
description: Opt-in progress heartbeats, adaptive thresholds, and exact-turn managed restart for one Codex thread.

interface.shortDescription: Keep one opted-in Codex task moving to completion.
interface.longDescription: Monitors privacy-safe rollout progress, recommends local-history thresholds with explicit consent, and can pause or resume an existing Goal while interrupting only exact turns owned by its same-thread resident manager.
